pageDescription: Calculate your Body Mass Index and understand your weight status with our comprehensive BMI calculator

bmiFormula.label: BMI Formula
bmiFormula.metric: BMI = weight in kg / (height in meters)²

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides estimates only and is not a diagnostic tool
criticalWarningsList.individualVariation: BMI may not accurately reflect body composition for athletes or individuals with high muscle mass

importantNotesList: BMI is a screening tool and not a diagnostic measure of body fatness
For children and adolescents (≤20 years), use CDC growth charts
Consult healthcare professionals for personalized advice
Consider other health metrics alongside BMI for a complete picture

healthyRangeDetails.title: 18.5 – 25 kg/m²
healthyRangeDetails.description: is considered the healthy BMI range for adults.
healthyRangeDetails.association: This range is associated with the lowest risk of health problems and mortality.

messages.enterMeasurements: Enter your measurements to calculate your BMI
messages.ageWarning: For children and adolescents (≤20 years), use pediatric growth charts

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides estimates based on mathematical formulas and should not be used as a substitute for professional medical advice. Individual results may vary based on factors not accounted for in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Consult a Healthcare Professional
seekHelp.content: If you have concerns about your weight or health, please consult with a healthcare professional who can provide personalized advice based on your complete medical history and individual circumstances.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm

tooltips.age: Age can affect BMI interpretation for children/adolescents

modify_the_values_and_click_the_calculat: Modify the values and click the calculate button to use
enter_your_details_to_calculate_your_bmi: Enter your details to calculate your BMI
